Assessment Resident Mood Interview (PHQ-9) Total Severity Score Number CHAR 2 The data in this column contains the resident mood interview (PHQ-9) total severity score from the most recent prior OBRA or PPS assessment.
564 V0200A01A_DLRM_CTR_CD V0200A01A_DLRM_CTR_CD V0200A01A Delirium Care Area Trigger Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the Delirium CA was triggered. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not checked (No)
1=Checked (Yes)
565 V0200A01B_DLRM_CPL_CD
